__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Echo and Narcissus,Celestial Throne
|rank=orange
|amount=2
|category=self
|description=Per 5 Divine Chaos Chests opened: Snail HP +70; Divine Chaos Chests Opened: 100/100
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Divine Chaos Chests]]
